hero.title: Ukraine Pipepiles
hero.subtitle:
first company in Ukraine exclusively manufacturing pipe pile and H-beam sheet pile systems based on the patented MF-Pipe technology developed by SteelWall ISH GmbH (Germany).
Pipe pile and H-beam sheet pile systems have been widely used worldwide for many years in major infrastructure and hydraulic engineering projects.

Today, these systems are manufactured in Ukraine.

Production utilizes
certified steel pipes and H-beams from various manufacturers,
+
unique patented SteelWall ISH GmbH interlock connectors supplied exclusively to Ukraine by STEELWALL UKRAINE (www.steelwallukr.com | ymatt24@yahoo.com).

This enables the production of highly reliable pipe pile systems for demanding civil and hydraulic engineering projects, including:

• port infrastructure (moles, quays, and shoreline protection structures);
• retaining walls (viaducts, multi-level road interchanges, stabilization of highways, railways, oil and gas pipelines);
• bridge structures (bridge approaches and support caissons);
• underground structures and tunnels (horizontal drilling – DTH technology);
• deep excavations and multi-level parking facilities for civil construction projects.

The manufactured piles comply with Ukrainian Technical Specifications TU U 24.2-455223116-002:2025, specifically developed to regulate the production of high-quality and reliable pile systems.
